title: Sum of items
excerpt: How can I count all the itens in a status-column over more board. IE: When I have three boards with the same status-column, I’d like to count the answers in a dashboard-widget.

posts.author: Prago (Willem van Gool)
posts.cookedHtml: How can I count all the itens in a status-column over more board. IE: When I have three boards with the same status-column, I’d like to count the answers in a dashboard-widget.
